# COGNITION_STATE_ENVELOPE_V1

Status: governed read-only consolidation milestone.

## Purpose

`BOUNDED_COGNITION_STATE_ENVELOPE_V1` consolidates existing AiGOL / SAPIANTA cognition evidence into one deterministic state artifact.

It represents bounded institutional cognition visibility across semantic ingress, admissibility, authority boundaries, replay lineage, evidence references, reflection references, boundary state, and continuity status.

## Scope

This milestone is:

- analysis-only;
- read-only;
- observability-only;
- replay-visible;
- fail-closed.

It does not certify semantic truth.

## Explicit Non-Authority Guarantees

The envelope grants:

- no execution authority;
- no orchestration authority;
- no autonomous continuation;
- no mutation authority;
- no provider routing authority;
- no retry authority;
- no self-modifying governance authority;
- no hidden context ingestion authority.

## UNKNOWN Handling

Missing evidence is represented as `UNKNOWN`.

The envelope must not guess, repair, infer hidden context, synthesize missing lineage, or upgrade absent evidence into authority.

## Authority Matrix

The authority matrix reports observed authority state from existing artifacts only. It distinguishes:

- ChatGPT semantic authority;
- governance authority;
- human approval authority;
- dispatch authority;
- execution authority;
- provider authority;
- replay authority;
- reflection authority;
- mutation authority.

The matrix does not issue authority.

## Replay Behavior

Envelope generation is deterministic. It preserves replay identity, lineage references, evidence references, and a deterministic envelope hash where available.

Replay inspection remains read-only and does not mutate replay history.

## Boundary

This artifact consolidates cognition visibility.

It does not create cognition agency.
